message:
feat(benchmark): add reranker quality evaluation framework

Implement comprehensive reranker quality benchmarking:
- RerankQualityBenchmark for comparing retrieval with/without reranking
- MetricsAtK: NDCG, MRR, MAP, Precision, Recall at configurable cutoffs
- LiftMetrics: compute percentage improvements over baseline
- Query classification by type (factual, entity, temporal, conversational)
- Bootstrap significance testing for metric improvements
- LatencyStats for percentile-based latency analysis

Closes bd-2ep.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
